tasks.title: Setup Project Structure and Environment
tasks.description: Initialize the project repository, set up virtual environment, and configure basic file structure as per PRD.
subtasks: Initialize Git repository and add .gitignore.
Create requirements.txt with necessary dependencies (langchain, crewai/langgraph, beautifulsoup4, pymupdf, tenacity, etc.).
Create .env.example with required API keys (Gemini, OpenRouter, Tavily/DuckDuckGo, and optionally Mathpix).
Scaffold directories: src/scraper, src/processing, src/agents, src/orchestrator, src/output, tests/.

tasks.title: Develop arXiv Scraper Service
tasks.description: Implement the web scraping module to extract clean text from arXiv URLs using HTML first, with a PDF fallback.
subtasks: Implement primary HTML scraping function using BeautifulSoup4 targeting arxiv.org/html/<id>.
Implement fallback PDF scraping function using PyMuPDF/pdfplumber for arxiv.org/pdf/<id> and log `[FORMULA: image-only, skipped]` for image-embedded formulas.
Implement optional Tier 3 extraction using Mathpix OCR / LaTeX-OCR for complex mathematical formulas.
Create CLI entrypoint logic to accept and validate arXiv URL.

tasks.title: Implement Document Decomposition and Chunking Engine
tasks.description: Process the scraped text into logical sections and ensure no chunk exceeds the 16k token limit.
subtasks: Write parser to decompose text into Abstract, Methodology, Results, Conclusion.
Implement token counting utility to estimate token size of text chunks.
Develop chunking logic to strictly enforce the <16,000 token limit per LLM call.

tasks.title: Build Specialized AI Agents
tasks.description: Develop the five specialized agents required for paper evaluation.
subtasks: Implement Consistency Agent (methodology vs results validation).
Implement Grammar & Language Agent (professional tone and syntax).
Implement Novelty Agent (integrate Semantic Scholar Graph API and arXiv Search API).
Implement Fact-Checker Agent (extract claims and verify, integrate Tavily/DuckDuckGo).
Implement Authenticity Agent (calculate Fabrication Probability using the 4 defined metrics).

tasks.title: Develop Agent Orchestrator Workflow
tasks.description: Configure the agentic framework (CrewAI or LangGraph) to manage the multi-agent execution pipeline.
subtasks: Define agent roles, goals, and tasks within the framework.
Configure the workflow for passing chunked data, batching small chunks (<8k tokens).
Implement 4-second pacing (`asyncio.sleep`) between agent calls to respect 15 RPM limits.
Implement error handling via `tenacity` exponential backoff (max 3 retries) and 3-tier provider fallback.
Implement caching for LLM responses per chunk hash.

tasks.title: Implement Report Generator
tasks.description: Format the multi-agent outputs into a comprehensive Judgement Report.
subtasks: Create a data model/schema for compiling agent outputs.
Calculate final Fabrication Probability percentage based on the weighted metrics.
Implement Markdown report generation.
Implement PDF report generation using reportlab or WeasyPrint.

tasks.title: End-to-End Testing and Final Integration
tasks.description: Test the entire pipeline using a known arXiv paper as a benchmark.
subtasks: Write integration test evaluating a specific arXiv URL.
Verify token limits are respected across all API calls.
Ensure final report contains all required sections and scores.
Finalize README.md with setup and usage instructions.
